# EmmyLua Meta Files

This folder contains EmmyLua meta files for external libraries to provide better IDE support and autocompletion.

- `Lummander.lua` provides type hints for the [Lummander CLI library](https://github.com/Desvelao/lummander).
- `LuaFileSystem.lua` provides type hints for the [LuaFileSystem library](https://github.com/lunarmodules/luafilesystem).
